description: A false-color satellite or aerial image displaying a coastal and riparian landscape. A large body of dark blue water, likely the sea or ocean, occupies the right side of the image with a curved shoreline. Inland, a winding dark blue river or canal is visible, flowing from the upper left towards the center. Extensive bright red areas, indicative of vigorous vegetation (e.g., forests, dense riparian vegetation, or actively growing crops), are present along the riverbanks and in irregular patches across the land. Large sections of the image are dominated by light grey and tan areas, characterized by distinct linear patterns, including parallel lines and grid-like formations, suggesting agricultural fields or managed land with bare soil or sparse vegetation. Finer white and light grey lines delineate boundaries, roads, or infrastructure within these agricultural areas.
